TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_hunting1_Muu

S.FORM: iku ia kanamasia ku.
S.TRANSL: 我是那瑪夏的人。
I live in Namasia.

S.FORM: makasua cu niarapipining ku nesi niarapipining ku nesi makasa xx.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣我是在這裡出生的。
That’s it. I was born here.

S.FORM: aratatia cu ku moha cu ku na takitutura takitutura.
S.TRANSL: 後來長大了,我有去上學。
Later, I grew up. I went to school.

S.FORM: mehua ia campe ku marisinatʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那時候剛剛開始寫字。
At that time, I just started to learn writing.

S.FORM: i nianci.
S.TRANSL: 一年級。
First grade.

S.FORM: mehua ia pue’i ku tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 那時候,我回家。
At that time, I went home.

S.FORM: makacang ku maritakarʉ ngʉco nakʉv in uvungngung ku.
S.TRANSL: 我馬上把衣服拿起來又藏起來
I immediately took those clothes up and hide them.

S.FORM: makasua cu.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣。
That’s all

S.FORM: cʉmʉvʉrʉ cu ku aratatia cu ku maripapa nacuma maku moha na nʉmʉra.
S.TRANSL: 我已經增長了,長大了,我過去的爸爸帶著我到山上。
I had grown up, my father who has passed away took me into the mountains.

S.FORM: makasua cu maripapa kua nacuma maku moha nʉmʉra.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候我爸爸一直帶我去山上。
At that time, my father always took me to the mountains.

S.FORM: misen nacuma maku ’tupura nesi cʉmʉ’ʉra ngʉco ta sikamanʉng maku ringee.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸叫我在這邊坐下,說:「注意看我怎麼做大野獸的陷阱。」
My father said ‘Sit here. See how I make the traps for big animals.

S.FORM: mon nia topuru kamanʉng cuma ku ringee.
S.TRANSL: 我一直在那邊坐很久,我爸爸一直在做陷阱。
I sat there for a while. My father kept making traps.

S.FORM: makasua cu pue’i kim tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,我們就回家。
Then, we went home.

S.FORM: makasua cu aratavarʉ’ʉ cu ku.
S.TRANSL: 我比較懂了。
Then, I more understood the things.

S.FORM: pakanang cu ku.
S.TRANSL: 我懂了。
I understood.

S.FORM: mehua ia maraa marang cu nacuma maku.
S.TRANSL: 當我比較懂事了,我的爸爸就比較老一點。
At that time, as I know things more, my father became aged.

S.FORM: sinsipatʉn pue’i ku ’inia ’e ’inia takuisi nimuringe.
S.TRANSL: 過了十天以後，我回去那，在那邊我套到山羊。
After ten days, I went back there. I caught a goat there!

S.FORM: a a a misee ngʉcoo takuisi makasua cu vura’e kua navung in.
S.TRANSL: 然後我打他的頭。
Then I hit its head.

S.FORM: vura’e kua navung in.
S.TRANSL: 我打他的頭。
I hit its head.

S.FORM: ha’uni ikua ka’an ku tatʉkʉvʉ.
S.TRANSL: 我背不動。
I could not carry it.

S.FORM: makasua cu pue’ cu ku tanasa macangcangarʉ nacina maku nacuma maku nipue’i cu makasua cu takuisi.
S.TRANSL: 打到一個山羊,把皮先拿掉,就這樣回家了,他的爸媽看到他說,你打到了他們很高興。
I caught a goat. I took off its hide firstly. Then I went home. ‘You caught a goat!’ my parents said to me happily.

S.FORM: makasua cu nimosa ku na na ngʉcoo hetai.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣我就去部隊。
Then I entered the army.

S.FORM: makasua cu ku na ngʉnco cakʉran Namasia ihi na ngʉnco ikita Kanakanavu ia pakasin toliu.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,我們在楠梓仙溪這邊,我們卡那卡那富,就被叫做六溪。
Just like this, we Kanakanavu are called liuxi because of the river.

S.FORM: wow siree vutun tatia! mʉkʉn makai cacane ikua vutun!.
S.TRANSL: 哇塞！山鹿很大！
Oops! The deer was quite big!

S.FORM: ka’an ku tavara’ʉ ngʉnco pusaan ’inia pepacare kua.
S.TRANSL: 不知道要怎麼樣搬，就用殺的。
I did not know how to move it, so I killed it.

S.FORM: mucan ku mokusa tanasa pokarikari cau.
S.TRANSL: 我就回家去跟人說。
Then I went home and told people that.

S.FORM: makasua cu pue’i kim tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,我們回家。
Then we went home.

S.FORM: mehua ia una pa ngʉnco pu’a ngʉnco aram mehua ia mamanʉng pa ngʉnco mehua kimparaa mara tatia pa.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候還好錢還比較大。
It was good that money was big.

S.FORM: makasua cu sinsʉpatʉn pue’i ku nia sʉmasʉrʉcʉ poringee iikua mangʉrisi.
S.TRANSL: 然後四天後，我套到公山豬。
After four days, I went back there to see the traps. I caught a male boar.

S.FORM: vavuru ia noo nimakurivi ipucʉn ia an ka’icʉpʉn.
S.TRANSL: 如果山豬的牙齒往外翻,那它不可怕。
If the teeth of the boar grow outward, it will not be terrifying.

S.FORM: makasua cu pepacarʉ akua vavura ihua.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣,我刺那山豬。
Then I stabbed that boar.

S.FORM: cakʉpu iikua vavura iihua.
S.TRANSL: 我刺那山豬。
I stabbed that boar.

S.FORM: makasua cu ’an ku tatʉkʉvʉ.
S.TRANSL: 我又搬不動。
I could not carry it.

S.FORM: mocan cu ku tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 我又回家了。
I went home.

S.FORM: pokari cau apo’un nia.
S.TRANSL: 我和人說話,叫他背。
I talked to a person and had him carry the boar.

S.FORM: ucan cu ma nikamanʉng maku ringee.
S.TRANSL: 只有一個我做的套。
There was only one trap I made.

S.FORM: tarakusa ku 'inia akia vunʉnga.
S.TRANSL: 我那裏到處看,沒有山豬套。
I saw around, but I didn’t see the boar trap.

S.FORM: nimangʉtʉn ku karu.
S.TRANSL: 我砍樹。
I cut the tree.

S.FORM: makai cʉ’rʉʉn maku tarisi takʉpucu mamia.
S.TRANSL: 我去看套。是圓圓的了。
I went to see the trap. It became round.

S.FORM: arasʉrʉcʉ mamia vavuru cakʉpe kua.
S.TRANSL: 山豬出現,我刺牠。
The boar showed up. I stabbed it.

S.FORM: maica na ngʉnco pesi maku.
S.TRANSL: 經過我的腿。
The rope passed by my leg.

S.FORM: nakai mamanʉng akia ngʉnco niaratu’usu kee tina’an maku kapepe vangkavuka maku.
S.TRANSL: 還好沒有(受傷)。只是碰到我的身體,我的褲子。
Luckily, I was not injured. It just touched my body and my pants.

S.FORM: ni niararesi kee.
S.TRANSL: 褲子破了。
The pants was torn.
